sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110495" key="feismonh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φεισμονή</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n110495.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sparing, mercy,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
